Why Gogou Pets

"We only share what we'd genuinely buy again."

Finding pet products that actually work is harder than it looks. We try things ourselves first — and only share what earns a permanent place in our home.

See what we currently recommend →
01
We only share what we use
If we wouldn't repurchase it, you won't see it here.
02
Fewer, better things
Three things worth buying beats a hundred maybes.
03
Made for real UK homes
Chosen for actual UK flats and houses, not photoshoots.
04
Small, independent, unsponsored
Our opinions are genuinely our own.

Featured partner · We repurchase this ourselves

Natural Tofu Cat Litter
that actually works

Gogou Exclusive Price
£12.99
£9.99
per 6.8L bag
🚚 Free UK shipping on 3+ bags

The one we keep going back to for our own cats. 6.8L of natural tofu litter — lightweight, clean, and genuinely effective in a real UK home.

💨
Low Dust
Cleaner air for you and your cats. No cloud when you pour or scoop.
🌸
Strong Odour Control
Keeps your home genuinely fresh — not just masked.
🧲
Easy to Clean
Quick clumping, less mess. Spot-cleaning takes 30 seconds.
🌿
Lightweight & Long-lasting
6.8L natural tofu. Flushable, eco-friendly, 100% recyclable packaging.
🏷️ Gogou exclusive price: £9.99/bag was £12.99
🚚 Free UK shipping on orders of 3 bags or more
📦 Available across the whole of the UK
💬 Order via Facebook, WeChat or Instagram
Order now — £9.99/bag Ask us anything

in UK pet homes

Morning routine

Fresh litter before the morning tea. Takes 30 seconds now.

Windowsill life

They always find the best light.

🐾
Tiny footprints

A reminder they were there.

😴
Sunday afternoon

Warm sun. A very contented cat.
